title: Logical Connectives and Truth Table Construction Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating how basic logical connectives combine propositions and the process for building their truth tables.
relationships: Input propositions P and Q feed into connective operators
Each connective processes inputs according to its logical rule
The output of a connective is a new compound proposition with a truth value
All possible combinations of input truth values are systematically listed in a truth table
Each row of the truth table calculates and displays the output for a specific input combination
